allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\senar\\Downloads\\GasWarMode Dashboard.html" -Encoding UTF8; $templateLine = $content[184]; Write-Host "Template starts with: $\($templateLine.Substring\(0,50\)\)"; Write-Host "Template type: $\($templateLine.GetType\(\).Name\)"; # Search for any CSS marker $patterns = @\('body', 'background', 'color', '#1', '--'\); foreach \($p in $patterns\) { $idx = $templateLine.IndexOf\($p\); Write-Host "Pattern '$p' found at: $idx" })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\senar\\Downloads\\GasWarMode Dashboard.html" -Encoding UTF8; $templateLine = $content[184]; $idx = $templateLine.IndexOf\('background'\); Write-Host "background at: $idx"; if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host $templateLine.Substring\($idx, [Math]::Min\(2000, $templateLine.Length - $idx\)\) })
